summary_en: 4,191,218 shares (4.43% of issued shares) to be cancelled effective 2026-08-07. Cancellation contingent on shareholder approval of stock consolidation scheduled for 2026-08-10 effectiveness at the 2026-07-06 extraordinary general meeting.
title_en: Notice of Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Solasto Corporation's board resolved on 2026-05-27 to cancel all treasury shares held by the company as of the cancellation date (2026-08-07), pursuant to the Companies Act Article 178. As of 2026-05-19, the company held 4,191,218 treasury shares, representing 4.43% of the 94,741,793 total issued shares (including treasury stock). The cancellation is conditional upon shareholder approval at the extraordinary general meeting scheduled for 2026-07-06 of a stock consolidation proposal with an effective date of 2026-08-10, as disclosed in a separate press release issued the same day.
